creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Feedback timeout (3 months).  To submitter: if you are still interested 
in this, please provide the feedback we need (output of "pciconf -l") and 
I can reopen this PR.  As an aside, it may be worth trying FreeBSD 7.0, 
your network card may be recognised already in that release.
